prompt: A whimsical 3D paper-cut family portrait scene in a traditional Japanese village during cherry blossom season. Family of five smiling together near water canals and wooden homes, surrounded by tulips, butterflies, and lush greenery. Mount Fuji towering in the background beneath soft paper clouds and blue skies. Handmade craft aesthetic, layered cardstock textures, soft ambient lighting, miniature diorama composition, cute cartoon proportions, highly detailed, vertical poster format.
